name: @statisticsnorway/design-css
description: CSS entry point for SSB’s design system with Digdir base styles, SSB theme, and fonts
author: Statistics Norway

scripts.build: pnpm clean && postcss "src/**/*.css" --base src --dir dist/src && cp src/fonts/*.woff2 dist/src/fonts && cp types.d.ts dist/types.d.ts
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist/src/fonts && cp src/fonts/*.woff2 dist/src/fonts && cp types.d.ts dist/types.d.ts && postcss "src/**/*.css" --base src --dir dist/src --watch
